new_classes.definition_en: Concentrated grape must of heading 2204 30, defined per Additional Note 7 to Chapter 22 of the Combined Nomenclature, distinct from grape must in fermentation or with fermentation arrested otherwise than by alcohol (CN 2204 30 10) and from the concentrated grape must classified under CN 2204 30 92.

coverage_explanation: The legal text for CN 2204 30 96 is very brief: it states "Concentrated" and refers to Additional Note 7 to Chapter 22. The class is modelled as a subclass of GrapeMust2204 bearing a ConcentrationQuality (already in the TBox), which captures the key distinguishing criterion (concentration). However, the specific quantitative or qualitative criteria of Additional Note 7 (which defines what 'concentrated grape must' means in terms of density, Brix, or other parameters) are not reproduced in the legal notes provided and therefore cannot be fully formalised. The sibling distinction from CN 2204 30 92 (which is also concentrated grape must) is also not captured, as the differentiating sub-criteria between 22043092 and 22043096 are not given in the supplied notes. Coverage is therefore partial.
